languages.text: "Сказано прямо как по Уставу! Родился бы на Заркове — мог бы за звание капитана, а то и полковника сразиться".

traits.locale_text: "Сказано прямо как по Уставу! Родился бы на Заркове — мог бы за звание капитана, а то и полковника сразиться".

languages.text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, you could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."
languages.original_text: "Сказано прямо как по Уставу! Родился бы на Заркове — мог бы за звание капитана, а то и полковника сразиться".

traits.locale_text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, he could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."
"Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, he could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."

languages.text: "El Kitabı'ndan fırlamış gibi sözler! Zarkov'da doğmuş olsaydın yüzbaşı, albaylık mevkisi için bile mücadele edebilirdin."
languages.original_text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, you could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."

traits.locale_text: "El Kitabı'ndan fırlamış gibi sözler! Zarkov'da doğmuş olsaydın yüzbaşı, albaylık mevkisi için bile mücadele edebilirdin."

languages.text: « Voilà qui semble avoir été tiré tout droit du Manuel ! Si vous aviez vu le jour sur Zarkov , vous auriez pu vous battre jusqu'à atteindre le grade de capitaine, voire de colonel, ma parole ! »
languages.original_text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, you could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui semble avoir été tiré tout droit du Manuel ! Si vous aviez vu le jour sur Zarkov , vous auriez pu vous battre jusqu'à atteindre le grade de capitaine, voire de colonel, ma parole ! »

languages.text: «¡Lo mismo que dice el Manual! De haber nacido en Zarkov, podría haber luchado por el rango de {mf|capitán|capitana}, o incluso coronel, qué demonios».
languages.original_text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, you could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."

traits.locale_text: «¡Lo mismo que dice el Manual! De haber nacido en Zarkov, podría haber luchado por el rango de {mf|capitán|capitana}, o incluso coronel, qué demonios».

languages.text: “这话简直跟《手册》上写的一样！要是你生在扎尔科夫，别说当个上尉，就是混到上校也不是没可能。”
languages.original_text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, you could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."

traits.locale_text: “这话简直跟《手册》上写的一样！要是你生在扎尔科夫，别说当个上尉，就是混到上校也不是没可能。”

languages.text: "Genau wie es im Handbuch steht. Wärt Ihr auf Zarkov geboren worden, hättet Ihr es zum Captain oder sogar Colonel bringen können."
languages.original_text: "Words straight out of the Handbook! Born on Zarkov, you could have fought for the rank of captain, or hell, even colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Genau wie es im Handbuch steht. Wärt Ihr auf Zarkov geboren worden, hättet Ihr es zum Captain oder sogar Colonel bringen können."
